summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NEW FEATURES: Pine Script download endpoint, dual drawdown methods (anchored vs spec), and robustness diagnostics (PSR, DSR, PBO, bootstrap CI). All backend APIs and frontend UI elements working correctly. Strategy intentionally fails acceptance criteria and shows high overfitting risk - this is EXPECTED behavior per design.
passed_tests: Backend: Pine Script endpoint returns 200, text/plain, starts with '//@version=6'
Backend: Drawdown method 'anchored' returns both max_drawdown_anchored (2.188) and max_drawdown_spec (22.059), with max_drawdown == max_drawdown_anchored
Backend: Drawdown method 'spec' returns max_drawdown == max_drawdown_spec (22.059), different from anchored
Backend: Single backtest diagnostics include PSR (0.169), sharpe_ci_low (-1.904), sharpe_ci_high (0.512), bootstrap_p_value (0.8225)
Backend: PBO and DSR are null for single runs (as expected)
Backend: Regression tests pass - instruments, strategy info, single backtest ES
Frontend: Drawdown Method toggle exists with both anchored and spec buttons
Frontend: Download Pine Script button exists and is clickable
Frontend: Robustness panel appears after single backtest with PSR (16.9%), Sharpe CI (-1.90 → 0.51), Bootstrap P (82.3%)
Frontend: PBO and DSR show 'run optimization' placeholder for single runs (correct behavior)
Frontend: Max Drawdown metric displays both anchored (218.8%) and spec (2205.9%) values in sub-text
Frontend: Toggling drawdown method from anchored to spec changes displayed max drawdown from 218.8% to 2205.9%
Frontend: Regression - Overview, Charts, Trades, Model tabs all functional
action_item_for_main_agent: None. All new features (Pine Script download, dual drawdown methods, robustness diagnostics) are working correctly. Strategy intentionally fails acceptance criteria (negative Sharpe -0.69, high drawdown 2205.9% spec / 218.8% anchored, high PBO risk ~43%) - this is EXPECTED behavior per the honest-results philosophy, NOT a bug.
